seoTitle: Felton South vs Ferney — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Felton South and Ferney. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Felton South vs Ferney: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Felton South and Ferney.
heading: Felton South vs Ferney — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Felton South, Queensland and Ferney, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Felton South has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Ferney (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Felton South or Ferney safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Felton South has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Ferney scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Felton South scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Ferney scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Felton South or Ferney?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Felton South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
